## Checklist

- [ ] `just lint` passes (markdownlint + pre-commit).
- [ ] `just parity` passes (palette parity across README, theme JSON, CSS).
- [ ] `just package` produces a VSIX without warnings.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if the change is
      user-visible.
- [ ] README palette block (`<!-- palette:start --> … <!-- palette:end -->`)
      updated if a canonical hex changed.
- [ ] Screenshots attached if the change is visually observable.
